backend/test/authz-organization-structure-contract.test.js:11:test("memberships are NULL-safe unique and never assign roles implicitly",async()=>{const repo=createInMemoryOrganizationStructureRepository(); const svc=createUnitService({repository:repo,taxonomyPort:taxonomy(),runtimeConsistencyPort:rt()}); const memSvc=createUnitMembershipService({repository:repo,runtimeConsistencyPort:rt()}); const unit=await svc.createUnit({organizationId:"org",hierarchyKey:"academic_structure",unitType:"academic_department",stableKey:"math",displayName:"Math",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); await svc.activateUnit({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); await assert.rejects(()=>memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"ana",relationshipType:"leads",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}),/organization_membership_role_required/); const m=await memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"ana",logtoRoleId:"role_headteacher",relationshipType:"leads",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); assert.equal(m.logtoRoleId,"role_headteacher"); await assert.rejects(()=>memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"ana",logtoRoleId:"role_headteacher",relationshipType:"leads",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}),/organization_membership_duplicate/); const member=await memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"bob",relationshipType:"member",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); await assert.rejects(()=>memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"bob",relationshipType:"member",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}),/organization_membership_duplicate/); assert.equal(member.logtoRoleId,null);});

backend/test/authz-organization-structure-contract.test.js:13:test("membership expiration is enforced by timestamps, not a worker",async()=>{const repo=createInMemoryOrganizationStructureRepository(); const svc=createUnitService({repository:repo,taxonomyPort:taxonomy(),runtimeConsistencyPort:rt()}); const memSvc=createUnitMembershipService({repository:repo,runtimeConsistencyPort:rt()}); const unit=await svc.createUnit({organizationId:"org",hierarchyKey:"academic_structure",unitType:"academic_department",stableKey:"math",displayName:"Math",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); await svc.activateUnit({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); const m=await memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"ana",logtoRoleId:"role_teacher",relationshipType:"teaches",validFrom:"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",validUntil:"2026-02-01T00:00:00Z",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); assert.equal(memSvc.isEffective(m,new Date("2026-01-15T00:00:00Z")),true); assert.equal(memSvc.isEffective(m,new Date("2026-03-01T00:00:00Z")),false);});

backend/test/authz-organization-structure-contract.test.js:15:test("scope candidates preserve role provenance and never grant final allow",async()=>{const repo=createInMemoryOrganizationStructureRepository(); const svc=createUnitService({repository:repo,taxonomyPort:taxonomy(),runtimeConsistencyPort:rt()}); const memSvc=createUnitMembershipService({repository:repo,runtimeConsistencyPort:rt()}); const unit=await svc.createUnit({organizationId:"org",hierarchyKey:"academic_structure",unitType:"academic_department",stableKey:"math",displayName:"Math",dimensionValueId:"math-tax-id",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); await svc.activateUnit({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); const m=await memSvc.assignMembership({organizationId:"org",unitId:unit.id,logtoUserId:"ana",logtoRoleId:"role_teacher",relationshipType:"teaches",actorLogtoUserId:"u"}); const resolver=createScopeCandidateResolver({repository:repo,taxonomyPort:taxonomy()}); const c=await resolver.resolveCandidatesForMembership({organizationId:"org",membershipId:m.id}); assert.equal(c.length,1); assert.equal(c[0].dimensionKey,"academic.subject"); assert.equal(c[0].logtoRoleId,"role_teacher"); assert.equal(c[0].source.type,"unit_membership"); assert.equal(c[0].allowed,undefined);});

backend/test/authz-organization-structure-contract.test.js:17:test("audience DSL is closed, bounded, and preview is redacted",async()=>{const def={version:1,op:"and",children:[{predicate:"unit_relationship_in",relationshipTypes:["teaches","leads"]},{predicate:"dimension_value_in",dimensionKey:"academic.subject",valueIds:["math-tax-id"]}]}; assert.equal(validateAudienceDefinition(def),true); assert.throws(()=>validateAudienceDefinition({version:1,predicate:"raw_sql",sql:"select * from users"}),/organization_audience_definition_invalid/); const repo=createInMemoryOrganizationStructureRepository(); await repo.insertAudience({logtoOrganizationId:"org",stableKey:"math_teachers",displayName:"Math teachers",definitionJson:def,createdByLogtoUserId:"u",updatedByLogtoUserId:"u"}); const previewSvc=createAudiencePreviewService({repository:repo}); const a=(await repo.listAudiences({organizationId:"org"}))[0]; const preview=await previewSvc.preview({organizationId:"org",audienceId:a.id}); assert.equal(preview.sample.length,0); assert.equal(preview.structureVersions.unitGraph,0);});

currentWriteProtections.productionClient: write capable; not safe for discovery remote reads
